title: Fox (FOXA) to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Fox's (FOXA) first-quarter fiscal 2023 performance is likely to have benefited from growth in News network viewership and digital business expansion despite slow ad revenue growth.

title: Streamlining Streaming: Fox/Magnite Deal Latest Example Of Growing Trend
text: Ask anyone in the TV ad business what their biggest problem with streaming TV (aka “CTV”, fka “OTT”) TV is, and the answer is most likely “complexity.”

title: Fox Corporation Executives to Discuss First Quarter Fiscal 2023 Financial Results Via Webcast
text: NEW YORK and LOS ANGELES , Oct. 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Fox Corporation (Nasdaq: FOXA, FOX) will discuss first quarter fiscal 2023 financial results via a live audio webcast beginning at 8:30 a.m. ET / 5:30 a.m.

title: Why Fox Corporation Stock Plummeted on Monday
text: Monday's downward stock slides were the fallout from a merger plan that's currently being explored.

title: Fox (FOXA) and News Corp to Merge Under One Media Empire
text: Fox (FOXA) and News Corporation are to be brought under one umbrella again after 10 years of split.

title: News Corp. stock up, Fox shares down as investors weigh possible merger
text: Shares of News Corp. rose and shares of Fox Corp. fell after the companies said they were exploring whether to merge again.

title: Rupert Murdoch considering merging Fox and News Corp once again
text: Merger would combine Fox News and TMZ with newspaper and online news operations, almost a decade after they split

title: Rupert Murdoch explores recombining Fox and News Corp.
text: Murdoch split Fox and News Corp. in 2013. A deal would unite both wings of the company under one roof.

title: Rupert Murdoch Mulls Reuniting Fox And News Corp, Including WSJ
text: A deal would put products like Fox News and the Wall Street Journal under the same umbrella.

title: Rupert Murdoch is exploring the rejoining of Fox and News Corp into one single company
text: Fox Corp and News Corp split back in 2013. Now, Murdoch is thinking about reuniting the two major pillars of his media business.

title: Fox Corporation Forms Special Committee to Begin Exploring a Potential Combination with News Corporation
text: NEW YORK and LOS ANGELES , Oct. 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Fox Corporation ("FOX" or the "Company") (Nasdaq: FOX, FOXA) announced today that the Company's Board of Directors, following the receipt of letters from K. Rupert Murdoch and the Murdoch Family Trust, has formed a Special Committee composed of independent members of the Board (the "Special Committee") to begin exploring a potential combination with News Corporation ("News Corp") (Nasdaq: NWS, NWSA; ASX: NWS, NWSLV).

title: Rupert Murdoch explores reuniting his media empire by recombining Fox and News Corp
text: Rupert Murdoch is proposing that Fox Corp and News Corp combine nearly ten years after they. It would bring the two high-profile companies under one roof.

title: Rupert Murdoch explores reuniting Fox and News Corp
text: Rupert Murdoch has proposed a recombination of Fox Corp. and News Corp, the two wings of his media empire, nearly a decade after they split, according to people familiar with the situation.

title: Rupert Murdoch explores putting Fox and News Corp back together, report says
text: Rupert Murdoch is considering reuniting Fox News' parent with The Wall Street Journal's owner, a report says.
